text: A child has swallowed an unknown poisonous substance. You should:

options.text: Dilute the poison with several glasses of cool water.
Call your local Poison Control Centre and follow directions.
Give a solution of mild liquid dish detergent and water.
Use activated charcoal. 14 23 Anatomy and Physiology

explanation: In any suspected poisoning case, immediate contact with a professional Poison Control Centre is the standard procedure. They provide the most accurate medical guidance based on the specific substance and the casualty's age.
